name: granola-simple-mcp
description: A thin, no-frills MCP wrapper around Granola's official API — direct access to your meeting notes, summaries, and transcripts

scripts.build: tsc && echo '#!/usr/bin/env node' | cat - dist/index.js > dist/index.tmp && mv dist/index.tmp dist/index.js && chmod +x dist/index.js

author: stanleylai
